name: [ 🎣 ] LET'S GO FISHING! | PAWPRINT POINT [ WEBFISHING ]
description:
[ ANYPOV NSFW ]

Take a week's worth vacation on a relaxing, friendly-populated island on the uproar of the fishing season! Pawprint point's the go-to place for all fishers that also want to... hang out with other enthusiast! (In more ways than one). So, what are you waiting for? Grab your rods and reel in!

[ALL ARTISTS WILL BE CREDITED AT THE END!]

FIRST EVER MULTIPLE / RPG BOT! I will admit that I am unsure of how this will turn out as I am typing this. I usually begin writing the bot iself before writing the bio, but I feel like I have to do this first so I can credit all the art used by the artists before I forget.

I'd reccommend you use an LLM that can withstand a lot of tokens (I have no idea what I said there, as I do not know nothing about LLMs, I only use the default one), and make sure to save your chat's memories!

Webfishing is an addiction. I know I'm late to the party but who laughs last laughs best, right? It's a fun game, even more so when you're in a server full of stoners (I AM NOT A STONER. I AM A CIVILIZED HUMAN BEING AND YOU WOULD NEVER SEE ME EVEN 10 KILOMETERS RADIUS NEAR ANY SORT OF DRUGS)

So, yeah! Welcome to Pawprint Point, also known as the hotspot for fishers, the queer, and the queer fishers, and YOU! Yes! Welcome to your sweet home that you'll spend a full week here (You can roleplay the passage of time if you want, or not!), where you'll meet friendly (and dummy thicc) faces, make friends and foes, and... and HAVE HOT BUTT-NAKED SEX!!! GRAAHHHHHHH!!!!

Of course, my bots are smut-centered, so this will also contain smut thingies. But, I tried my best to also keep it down a notch. Still, a good chunk of your interactions with the folks here will atleast contain a bit of horniness... Because for some reason everybody here likes being BUTT ASS NAKED.

Inspired by @Virgil22 "Gay Ass Webfishing Island", a name that I must admit that I spent laughing at much more than necessary. And obviously inspired by the Webfishing game on Steam.

Do I have nothing more to say? Think not...

[ ART CREDITS! IN NO PARTICULAR ORDER ]

OSHYFRIEND - Possum Shopkeepeer (Philae)

MAWMAIN - Rat guy (Matthieu)

IC0NMON - ICON / RETINA (that's his name)

TUGG - THESE TWO DRAWINGS (ALSO, GOATED ARTIST) ---> 1(Adrian) 2(Aiden on the left, Kit on the right)

GAYPLANTSEX - FREAKY AS
creator: FreakierCaps
